title: Master v0.5.1 Broken Feedback Cleanup Tools
notes:
Adds direct cleanup buttons for deleting broken feedback files from the Master Feedback Queue.

Changes:
- Adds Delete Broken Selected button.
- Adds Delete All Broken button.
- Deletes broken feedback files directly by GitHub path/SHA.
- Does not parse broken JSON.
- Writes cleanup history entries.
- Sends Discord alert if enabled.
- Keeps Master v0.5.0 broken feedback recovery behavior.
